title: viola yezoensis
intro: Viola yezoensis, also known as the Yezo violet, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). Native to Japan, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola yezoensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Viola yezoensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
